クラス RotationSearcher

java.lang.Object
mechanics.optimization.RotationSearcher
public class RotationSearcher extends Object
Finds the highest-damage rotation by exhaustively evaluating all combinations of character order permutations and named action profiles.

The search space is:

  • Order permutations – all N! orderings of the party members.
  • Profile combinations – the Cartesian product of each character's available ProfileLoader.ActionProfiles.

All combinations are evaluated concurrently via a parallel stream. findBestRotation(Supplier) returns the RotationSearcher.RotationPlan with the highest total damage within a 25-second window.

  • ネストされたクラスの概要

    ネストされたクラス
    修飾子とタイプ
    クラス
    説明
    static class 
    RotationSearcher.RotationPlan
    The result of a single rotation evaluation: the character cast order, the action profile chosen for each character, and the total damage dealt.
    private static class 
    RotationSearcher.RunnableEvaluation
    Encapsulates a single (order, profiles) combination to be evaluated in the parallel stream.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • RotationSearcher

      public RotationSearcher()

  • メソッドの詳細

    • findBestRotation

      public RotationSearcher.RotationPlan findBestRotation(Supplier<CombatSimulator> simFactory)
      Searches all order permutations and profile combinations for the highest-damage rotation.

      Steps:

      1. Instantiates a temporary simulator to discover party member names.
      2. Loads action profiles for every character via ProfileLoader.
      3. Generates all N! order permutations and the Cartesian product of profile choices.
      4. Evaluates all resulting RotationSearcher.RunnableEvaluation tasks in parallel over a 25-second simulation window.
      5. Returns the plan with the maximum RotationSearcher.RotationPlan.totalDamage.
      パラメータ:
      simFactory - supplier that creates a fresh, identically configured CombatSimulator for each evaluation; called once per task plus once for discovery
      戻り値:
      the best-scoring RotationSearcher.RotationPlan found
      例外:
      RuntimeException - if no rotation can be evaluated

    • generatePermutations

      private List<List<CharacterId>> generatePermutations(List<CharacterId> original)
      Recursively generates all permutations of the given list.
      パラメータ:
      original - list of strings to permute
      戻り値:
      all N! orderings of the input list

    • generateProfileCombinations

      private List<Map<CharacterId, ProfileLoader.ActionProfile>> generateProfileCombinations(List<CharacterId> names, Map<CharacterId, List<ProfileLoader.ActionProfile>> availableProfiles)
      Generates the Cartesian product of each character's available profiles.
      パラメータ:
      names - ordered list of character names
      availableProfiles - map of character name to their loaded profiles
      戻り値:
      all combinations where each character has exactly one profile selected

    • generateRecursive

      private void generateRecursive(List<Map<CharacterId, ProfileLoader.ActionProfile>> result, Map<CharacterId, ProfileLoader.ActionProfile> current, List<CharacterId> names, int index, Map<CharacterId, List<ProfileLoader.ActionProfile>> available)
      Recursive helper that builds profile combinations by stepping through characters in names one index at a time.
      パラメータ:
      result - accumulator for completed combinations
      current - partially built combination for the current recursion frame
      names - ordered list of all character names
      index - current character index being assigned
      available - all available profiles per character
